name: sdtm-rule-smoke-test
description: Smoke test: verify agent identity prompt injection from AgentDefinition

agent.prompt: You received a CDISC CORE rule ID in input.ruleId. Summarize what you know about this rule based on your skills and knowledge. Output a JSON object with fields: ruleId, ruleName, description, sdtmDomains, and validationLogic. If you cannot find the rule, say so honestly.
